body_txt: Rounding out the Embarrassing Names Sisters (the others being Embarrassing First Name , Embarrassing Middle Name , Embarrassing Last Name , and Embarrassing Nickname ) is Embarrassing Initials—when this common method of abbreviating a name spells out something, well, embarrassing. Also a Sister Trope to Fun with Acronyms . Sub-Trope of Unfortunate Names . Compare Shoehorned Acronym when the acronym itself is awkward. The Asinine Activist Group tends to unwittingly pick a name for themselves which spells out one of these.
